_comment: MCP server configuration for this project. See https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io

mcpServers._instructions: Uncomment and configure the servers you want to use.

_github._comment: GitHub MCP server — issues, PRs, code search. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.

_filesystem._comment: Filesystem MCP server — broader file access outside project root.

_git._comment: Git MCP server — version >=2025.12.18 required (security fix).
_git._security_note: Pin to >=2025.12.18. Earlier versions have RCE vulnerabilities.
